relabelled_senses.definition: Extremely quiet or completely without sound.

literal: A disease or harmful condition that operates in a hidden or unnoticed way causing serious damage.
An expression of mild self-reproach or embarrassment used when one recognizes a minor mistake.
A very large or excessive amount of money.
A period of time characterized by trivial or frivolous news stories.

relabelled_senses.definition: The quality or power of speaking eloquently and persuasively; eloquence or rhetorical skill.
Possessing or exhibiting eloquence and persuasive skill in speech.
To become or cause someone to become calmer; to reduce anger, excitement, or agitation.
Extremely easy or straightforward; requiring little effort or thought.
The very embodiment of simplicity; utterly simple or easy to understand or perform.
To perform work or provide a service in order to earn one's living or obtain food and shelter.
To express the same opinions, present a united position, or follow the same plan of action as others.
Having or concentrating on only one aim or purpose; resolutely focused on a single goal.
To agree with one another or to present the same views and messages; to act in coordinated or harmonious fashion.
To downplay one's abilities, achievements, or importance; to act modestly or submissively.
To praise someone or something enthusiastically and publicly.

A government levy imposed on goods or activities regarded as morally undesirable or harmful (for example, alcohol, tobacco, gambling, or sugary drinks) with the aims of reducing consumption and raising revenue.
To act as a substitute for someone by temporarily performing their duties, role, or function.
To join and perform together with a group, typically used of musicians temporarily playing alongside a band or ensemble.
A dismissive or contemptuous expression meaning that someone may go away and experience an unpleasant consequence; used to tell someone off or to indicate indifference to their complaints.
